title: Evidence Reference
description: Common v1 reference to an evidence record used by smoke, completion, release, audit, and owner sign-off flows.
$comment: Source: TECH-01 Evidence Record Standard and MASTER-05 require each evidence item to have ID, owner, scope, status, audit, source rule, and references; only ACCEPTED evidence can be used to PASS.

evidenceStatus.description: Evidence status from TECH-01, MASTER-03, and MASTER-05.

sourceDocument.description: MASTER, PACK, TECH, or contract document that the evidence supports.

sourceRule.description: Specific source rule or requirement being proven.

referenceUri.description: File, log, report, or evidence registry reference. Do not expose internal evidence publicly unless a source policy allows it.
